messages.content:
请创建一个完整的 HTML5 游戏。游戏描述：蛇可以穿墙，这边进那边出。
                    
重要技术要求：
1. 单个 HTML 文件
2. 使用 Canvas API
3. Canvas 尺寸必须为 360x640 像素（9:16 竖屏比例）
4. 在 JavaScript 中设置：canvas.width = 360; canvas.height = 640;
5. 在 CSS 中设置：canvas { max-width: 100%; height: auto; display: block; margin: 0 auto; }
6. 包含完整游戏循环
7. 有得分系统
8. 确保有趣可玩

只返回 HTML 代码，不要其他说明。

modifications.prompt:
请创建一个完整的 HTML5 游戏。游戏描述：蛇可以穿墙，这边进那边出。
                    
重要技术要求：
1. 单个 HTML 文件
2. 使用 Canvas API
3. Canvas 尺寸必须为 360x640 像素（9:16 竖屏比例）
4. 在 JavaScript 中设置：canvas.width = 360; canvas.height = 640;
5. 在 CSS 中设置：canvas { max-width: 100%; height: auto; display: block; margin: 0 auto; }
6. 包含完整游戏循环
7. 有得分系统
8. 确保有趣可玩

只返回 HTML 代码，不要其他说明。
modifications.code:
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="zh-CN">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <title>穿墙贪吃蛇</title>
    <style>
        * {
            margin: 0;
            padding: 0;
            box-sizing: border-box;
        }
        body {
            background: linear-gradient(180deg, #1a1a2e 0%, #16213e 100%);
            min-height: 100vh;
            display: flex;
            justify-content: center;
            align-items: center;
            font-family: 'PingFang SC', 'Microsoft YaHei', sans-serif;
            overflow: hidden;
        }
        canvas {
            max-width: 100%;
            height: auto;
            display: block;
            margin: 0 auto;
            border-radius: 12px;
            box-shadow: 0 8px 32px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.4);
            background: linear-gradient(180deg, #1a1a2e 0%, #16213e 100%);
        }
    </style>
</head>
<body>
    <canvas id="gameCanvas"></canvas>

    <script>
        // 游戏常量
        const canvas = document.getElementById('gameCanvas');
        const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
        canvas.width = 360;
        canvas.height = 640;

        // 游戏状态
        const STATES = { MENU: 'menu', PLAYING: 'playing', PAUSED: 'paused', GAMEOVER: 'gameover' };
        let gameState = STATES.MENU;

        // 游戏变量
        const cellSize = 10;
        const gridWidth = canvas.width / cellSize;  // 36
        const gridHeight = canvas.height / cellSize; // 64
        let snake = [];
        let direction = { x: 1, y: 0 };
        let nextDirection = { x: 1, y: 0 };
        let food = { x: 0, y: 0 };
        let score = 0;
        let highScore = parseInt(localStorage.getItem('snakeHighScore')) || 0;
        let lastTime = 0;
        let moveInterval = 150; // 蛇移动间隔（毫秒）
        let moveTimer = 0;

        // 初始化游戏
        function initGame() {
            // 初始化蛇（从中心开始，长度3）
            const startX = Math.floor(gridWidth / 2);
            const startY = Math.floor(gridHeight / 2);
            snake = [
                { x: startX, y: startY },
                { x: startX - 1, y: startY },
                { x: startX - 2, y: startY }
            ];
            direction = { x: 1, y: 0 };
            nextDirection = { x: 1, y: 0 };
            score = 0;
            moveTimer = 0;
            spawnFood();
        }

        // 生成食物
        function spawnFood() {
            let valid = false;
            while (!valid) {
                food.x = Math.floor(Math.random() * gridWidth);
                food.y = Math.floor(Math.random() * gridHeight);
                // 确保食物不在蛇身上
                valid = !snake.some(segment => segment.x === food.x && segment.y === food.y);
            }
        }

        // 输入处理
        function handleInput(key, pressed) {
            if (!pressed) return;

            if (gameState === STATES.MENU) {
                if (key === 'Space' || key === 'Enter') {
                    gameState = STATES.PLAYING;
                    initGame();
                }
            } else if (gameState === STATES.PLAYING) {
                switch (key) {
                    case 'ArrowUp':
                    case 'KeyW':
                        if (direction.y !== 1) nextDirection = { x: 0, y: -1 };
                        break;
                    case 'ArrowDown':
                    case 'KeyS':
                        if (direction.y !== -1) nextDirection = { x: 0, y: 1 };
                        break;
                    case 'ArrowLeft':
                    case 'KeyA':
                        if (direction.x !== 1) nextDirection = { x: -1, y: 0 };
                        break;
                    case 'ArrowRight':
                    case 'KeyD':
                        if (direction.x !== -1) nextDirection = { x: 1, y: 0 };
                        break;
                    case 'KeyP':
                    case 'Escape':
                        gameState = STATES.PAUSED;
                        break;
                }
            } else if (gameState === STATES.PAUSED) {
                if (key === 'KeyP' || key === 'Escape') {
                    gameState = STATES.PLAYING;
                } else if (key === 'Space' || key === 'Enter') {
                    gameState = STATES.MENU;
                }
            } else if (gameState === STATES.GAMEOVER) {
                if (key === 'Space' || key === 'Enter') {
                    gameState = STATES.MENU;
                }
            }
        }

        // 游戏逻辑更新
        function update(deltaTime) {
            if (gameState !== STATES.PLAYING) return;

            moveTimer += deltaTime;
            if (moveTimer >= moveInterval) {
                moveTimer = 0;
                direction = { ...nextDirection };

                // 移动蛇头
                const head = { ...snake[0] };
                head.x += direction.x;
                head.y += direction.y;

                // 穿墙逻辑
                if (head.x < 0) head.x = gridWidth - 1;
                if (head.x >= gridWidth) head.x = 0;
                if (head.y < 0) head.y = gridHeight - 1;
                if (head.y >= gridHeight) head.y = 0;

                // 检查是否撞到自己
                if (snake.some(segment => segment.x === head.x && segment.y === head.y)) {
                    gameState = STATES.GAMEOVER;
                    if (score > highScore) {
                        highScore = score;
                        localStorage.setItem('snakeHighScore', highScore);
                    }
                    return;
                }

                // 添加新头部
                snake.unshift(head);

                // 检查是否吃到食物
                if (head.x === food.x && head.y === food.y) {
                    score += 10;
                    spawnFood();
                    // 加速：每吃一个食物，移动间隔减少（最小50ms）
                    moveInterval = Math.max(50, moveInterval - 2);
                } else {
                    // 没吃到食物，移除尾部
                    snake.pop();
                }
            }
        }

        // 游戏渲染
        function render() {
            // 清空画布
            ctx.clearRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);

            // 绘制背景网格（可选，增加视觉效果）
            ctx.strokeStyle = 'rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.05)';
            ctx.lineWidth = 1;
            for (let x = 0; x <= gridWidth; x++) {
                ctx.beginPath();
                ctx.moveTo(x * cellSize, 0);
                ctx.lineTo(x * cellSize, canvas.height);
                ctx.stroke();
            }
            for (let y = 0; y <= gridHeight; y++) {
                ctx.beginPath();
                ctx.moveTo(0, y * cellSize);
                ctx.lineTo(canvas.width, y * cellSize);
                ctx.stroke();
            }

            // 绘制食物
            ctx.fillStyle = '#ff6b6b';
            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.arc(
                food.x * cellSize + cellSize / 2,
                food.y * cellSize + cellSize / 2,
                cellSize / 2,
                0,
                Math.PI * 2
            );
            ctx.fill();

            // 绘制蛇
            snake.forEach((segment, index) => {
                const isHead = index === 0;
                ctx.fillStyle = isHead ? '#4fd1c5' : '#63b3ed';
                ctx.fillRect(
                    segment.x * cellSize,
                    segment.y * cellSize,
                    cellSize - 1,
                    cellSize - 1
                );
                // 为蛇头添加眼睛（可选）
                if (isHead) {
                    ctx.fillStyle = '#1a1a2e';
                    const eyeSize = 2;
                    const eyeOffset = 2;
                    // 根据方向调整眼睛位置
                    let eyeX1, eyeY1, eyeX2, eyeY2;
                    if (direction.x === 1) { // 向右
                        eyeX1 = segment.x * cellSize + cellSize - eyeOffset - eyeSize;
                        eyeY1 = segment.y * cellSize + eyeOffset;
                        eyeX2 = segment.x * cellSize + cellSize - eyeOffset - eyeSize;
                        eyeY2 = segment.y * cellSize + cellSize - eyeOffset - eyeSize;
                    } else if (direction.x === -1) { // 向左
                        eyeX1 = segment.x * cellSize + eyeOffset;
                        eyeY1 = segment.y * cellSize + eyeOffset;
                        eyeX2 = segment.x * cellSize + eyeOffset;
                        eyeY2 = segment.y * cellSize + cellSize - eyeOffset - eyeSize;
                    } else if (direction.y === -1) { // 向上
                        eyeX1 = segment.x * cellSize + eyeOffset;
                        eyeY1 = segment.y * cellSize + eyeOffset;
                        eyeX2 = segment.x * cellSize + cellSize - eyeOffset - eyeSize;
                        eyeY2 = segment.y * cellSize + eyeOffset;
                    } else { // 向下
                        eyeX1 = segment.x * cellSize + eyeOffset;
                        eyeY1 = segment.y * cellSize + cellSize - eyeOffset - eyeSize;
                        eyeX2 = segment.x * cellSize + cellSize - eyeOffset - eyeSize;
                        eyeY2 = segment.y * cellSize + cellSize - eyeOffset - eyeSize;
                    }
                    ctx.fillRect(eyeX1, eyeY1, eyeSize, eyeSize);
                    ctx.fillRect(eyeX2, eyeY2, eyeSize, eyeSize);
                }
            });

            // 绘制得分（顶部居中）
            ctx.fillStyle = 'white';
            ctx.font = 'bold 20px "PingFang SC", "Microsoft YaHei", sans-serif';
            ctx.textAlign = 'center';
            ctx.fillText('得分: ', canvas.width / 2 - 30, 30);
            ctx.fillStyle = '#4fd1c5';
            ctx.fillText(score, canvas.width / 2 + 20, 30);

            // 绘制最高分
            ctx.fillStyle = 'white';
            ctx.font = '14px "PingFang SC", "Microsoft YaHei", sans-serif';
            ctx.fillText(`最高分: ${highScore}`, canvas.width / 2, 55);

            // 根据游戏状态绘制覆盖层
            if (gameState === STATES.MENU) {
                drawOverlay('穿墙贪吃蛇', '按 空格键 或 回车 开始游戏', '使用 方向键 或 WASD 控制');
            } else if (gameState === STATES.PAUSED) {
                drawOverlay('游戏暂停', '按 P 或 ESC 继续', '按 空格键 返回菜单');
            } else if (gameState === STATES.GAMEOVER) {
                drawOverlay('游戏结束', `得分: ${score}`, '按 空格键 或 回车 返回菜单');
            }
        }

        // 绘制覆盖层
        function drawOverlay(title, subtitle, hint) {
            ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.7)';
            ctx.fillRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);

            ctx.fillStyle = 'white';
            ctx.font = 'bold 36px "PingFang SC", "Microsoft YaHei", sans-serif';
            ctx.textAlign = 'center';
            ctx.fillText(title, canvas.width / 2, canvas.height / 2 - 40);

            ctx.font = '20px "PingFang SC", "Microsoft YaHei", sans-serif';
            ctx.fillStyle = '#4fd1c5';
            ctx.fillText(subtitle, canvas.width / 2, canvas.height / 2 + 10);

            ctx.font = '16px "PingFang SC", "Microsoft YaHei", sans-serif';
            ctx.fillStyle = 'white';
            ctx.fillText(hint, canvas.width / 2, canvas.height / 2 + 50);
        }

        // 游戏循环
        function gameLoop(currentTime) {
            const deltaTime = currentTime - lastTime;
            lastTime = currentTime;

            update(deltaTime);
            render();

            requestAnimationFrame(gameLoop);
        }

        // 事件监听
        document.addEventListener('keydown', (e) => {
            handleInput(e.code, true);
        });

        // 初始化并开始游戏
        initGame();
        requestAnimationFrame(gameLoop);
    </script>
</body>
</html>
